title: SAM-Guided Floorplan Reconstruction with Semantic-Geometric Fusion
abstract: Leverages Segment Anything Model (SAM) for floorplan reconstruction by fusing semantic segmentation with geometric constraints. Combines SAM's zero-shot segmentation capability with domain-specific geometric reasoning for accurate room boundary detection and vectorized floorplan output.
method_summary: SAM-based segmentation fused with geometric constraint reasoning for accurate room boundary detection and vectorized floorplan reconstruction from raster images.

title: Raster2Seq: Polygon Sequence Generation for Floorplan Reconstruction
abstract: Frames floorplan reconstruction as a sequence-to-sequence task where floorplan elements (rooms, windows, doors) are represented as labeled polygon sequences. Enables end-to-end vectorized floorplan output from raster images.
method_summary: Sequence-to-sequence architecture generating labeled polygon sequences from raster floorplan images, unifying room, window, and door detection in a single autoregressive framework.

title: FloorplanVLM: A Vision-Language Model for Floorplan Vectorization
abstract: Presents FloorplanVLM, a unified framework converting raster floorplans into engineering-grade vector graphics. Addresses complex topology and strict geometric constraints through vision-language model capabilities.
method_summary: Vision-language model approach to floorplan vectorization, leveraging multimodal understanding to convert raster images into precise vector representations with correct topology.

title: Blueprint: Multimodal Retrieval for Complex Engineering Drawings and Documents
abstract: Presents Blueprint, a layout-aware multimodal retrieval system for legacy engineering drawings and technical records with inconsistent or missing metadata. Enables search across decades of archived engineering documents.
method_summary: Layout-aware multimodal retrieval combining visual and textual features for engineering drawing search, addressing inconsistent metadata in legacy archives.

title: Advancing Multimodal LLM Evaluation of Engineering Documentation with Enhanced Retrieval
abstract: Evaluates RAG systems on engineering rulebooks and technical standards containing multimodal information (dense text, tables, illustrations). Proposes enhanced retrieval strategies for engineering documentation understanding.
method_summary: RAG-enhanced evaluation framework for multimodal LLMs on engineering documentation, addressing challenges of dense text, tables, and technical illustrations.

title: DesignQA: A Multimodal Benchmark for Evaluating Large Language Models' Understanding of Engineering Documentation
abstract: Benchmark evaluating MLLM proficiency in comprehending and applying engineering requirements in technical documentation. Combines multimodal data including textual design requirements, CAD images, and engineering drawings derived from the Formula SAE competition.
method_summary: Document-grounded visual QA benchmark where input images and documents come from different sources, testing cross-modal engineering comprehension.

title: A Multi-Agent Human-AI Collaborative Pipeline to Convert Hand-Drawn Floor Plans to 3D BIM
abstract: Human-in-the-loop pipeline converting unscaled hand-drawn floor plan sketches into semantically consistent 3D BIM models. Multi-agent architecture handles sketch interpretation, semantic labeling, and 3D model generation.
method_summary: Multi-agent pipeline with human-in-the-loop for converting hand-drawn sketches to BIM, combining sketch recognition, semantic interpretation, and parametric 3D modeling.

title: Text2BIM: Generating Building Models Using a Large Language Model-based Multi-Agent Framework
abstract: LLM-based multi-agent framework generating 3D building models from natural language instructions. Facilitates intuitive expression of design intentions without mastering complex BIM authoring commands.
method_summary: Multi-agent LLM framework translating natural language design descriptions into BIM-compatible 3D building models through coordinated agent collaboration.

title: Small Building Model: A Transformer for Layout Synthesis in BIM
abstract: Transformer-based architecture for layout synthesis in Building Information Modeling scenes. Addresses building tokenization by unifying spatial and semantic representations for room layout generation.
method_summary: Transformer architecture with building-specific tokenization for BIM layout synthesis, jointly modeling spatial organization and semantic room attributes.

title: Controllable End-to-End Vector Floor Plan Generation
abstract: End-to-end approach for automated floor plan generation creating residential layouts by arranging rooms within given boundaries, balancing topological, geometric, and aesthetic considerations with controllable generation.
method_summary: End-to-end controllable generation framework directly producing vector floorplans from boundary constraints with user-specified topological and aesthetic controls.

title: DiffPlanner: Direct Vector Floor Plan Generation with Diffusion
abstract: Diffusion-based approach for boundary-constrained floor plan generation, directly generating topological and geometric properties of rooms within given boundaries. Surpasses existing methods in floor plan and bubble diagram generation.
method_summary: Diffusion model directly generating vector floor plans from boundary constraints, offering controllability in creative design stages.

title: Computer-Aided Layout Generation for Building Design: A Survey
abstract: Comprehensive review of three major research topics in architecture layout design: floorplan layout generation, scene layout synthesis, and generation of some other building elements. Covers optimization, heuristic, and deep generative approaches.
method_summary: Survey paper reviewing computational methods for building layout generation including optimization-based, heuristic, and deep learning approaches across floorplan, scene, and element generation.
discovery_query: computer-aided layout generation building design survey

title: Prediction of Visual Relations in Engineering Drawings
abstract: Predicts visual relations between elements in engineering drawings, achieving 96% accuracy in relation prediction. Addresses structural understanding of drawing components and their spatial relationships.
method_summary: Relation prediction model for engineering drawing elements, capturing spatial and semantic relationships between components for structural understanding.

title: Machine Learning-Based Manufacturing Cost Prediction from 2D Engineering Drawings via Geometric Features
abstract: Integrated ML framework transforming manufacturing cost estimation from 2D engineering drawings. Couples cost prediction with SHAP explainability to identify geometric design drivers including dimension maxima, arc statistics, and divergence metrics.
method_summary: ML pipeline extracting geometric features from 2D drawings for cost prediction, with SHAP-based explainability identifying key design cost drivers.

title: CircuitLM: A Multi-Agent LLM-Aided Design Framework for Generating Circuit Schematics from Natural Language Prompts
abstract: Multi-agent LLM framework generating accurate circuit schematics from natural language descriptions. Addresses LLM hallucination in graphical outputs through Electronic Circuit Model validation and constraint enforcement.
method_summary: Multi-agent pipeline combining LLM reasoning with Electronic Circuit Model for validated circuit schematic generation from natural language, reducing hallucination.

title: EEschematic: Multimodal-LLM Based AI Agent for Schematic Generation of Analog Circuit
abstract: AI agent for automatic analog schematic generation based on Multimodal Large Language Model. Integrates textual, visual, and structured data for end-to-end circuit schematic creation.
method_summary: MLLM-based agent integrating multimodal inputs (text, images, structured data) for automated analog circuit schematic generation with iterative refinement.

title: CircuitSense: A Hierarchical Circuit System Benchmark Bridging Visual Comprehension and Symbolic Reasoning
abstract: Comprehensive benchmark evaluating circuit understanding across six hierarchy levels from component-level schematics to system-level block diagrams. 8,006+ problems spanning Perception, Analysis, and Design tasks with emphasis on symbolic equation derivation.
method_summary: Hierarchical evaluation framework testing MLLMs on circuit understanding from resistor networks to system block diagrams, with three task categories and symbolic equation derivation.

title: Modular Graph Extraction for Handwritten Circuit Diagram Images
abstract: Modular pipeline for extracting graph representations from handwritten circuit diagram images. Sub-tasks include object detection for electrical symbols and texts, binary segmentation, and connectivity extraction.
method_summary: Modular pipeline decomposing handwritten circuit digitization into object detection, stroke segmentation, and graph connectivity extraction sub-tasks.

title: PCBSchemaGen: Constraint-Guided Schematic Design via LLM for Printed Circuit Boards
abstract: First training-free framework for PCB schematic design combining LLM agent with constraint-guided synthesis. Three contributions: LLM-based component selection, constraint-guided netlist generation, and simulation-based verification.
method_summary: Training-free LLM agent with constraint-guided synthesis for automated PCB schematic design, including component selection, netlist generation, and simulation verification.

title: Agentic Hardware Design Reviews
abstract: Agentic AI system for automated hardware design reviews of PCB schematics and layouts. Addresses costly post-fabrication design errors by automating review processes that traditionally require expert human inspection.
method_summary: Multi-agent AI system automating PCB design review through schematic analysis, design rule verification, and automated error detection before fabrication.

title: Rule-Based Autocorrection of Piping and Instrumentation Diagrams (P&IDs) on Graphs
abstract: Rule-based method for automated error detection and correction in P&IDs using graph representation. Enables autocorrection through rule graphs, supporting chemical engineers in P&ID quality assurance.
method_summary: Graph-based P&ID representation with rule graphs for automated error detection and correction, analogous to text autocorrection but for engineering diagrams.

title: Towards Automatic Generation of Piping and Instrumentation Diagrams (P&IDs) with Artificial Intelligence
abstract: Data-driven method for prediction of control structures in P&ID development. Proposes AI-based approach to automate the tedious manual process of P&ID creation during chemical process development.
method_summary: Data-driven prediction of control structures for automated P&ID generation, learning from existing diagram patterns to suggest instrumentation configurations.

title: GLSP: Parsing Line Segments of Floor Plan Images Using Graph Neural Networks
abstract: GNN-based Line Segment Parser using junction heatmap to predict line segment endpoints and graph neural networks to extract line segments and their categories from floor plan images.
method_summary: Junction heatmap prediction combined with GNN-based line segment extraction and categorization for structured floor plan parsing.
discovery_query: floor plan line segment parsing GNN

title: Text2MBL: Text-to-Code Generation for Modular Building Layouts in Building Information Modeling
abstract: Text-to-code generation framework producing executable BIM code directly from textual descriptions of modular building layout designs. Bridges natural language and parametric BIM modeling.
method_summary: LLM-based text-to-code pipeline generating executable BIM scripts from natural language modular building layout descriptions.

title: Opportunities and Challenges of Large Circuit Models
abstract: Survey on AI-driven solutions in Electronic Design Automation domain, examining how large circuit models can redefine existing methodologies rather than merely augmenting them. Covers circuit understanding, generation, and verification.
method_summary: Survey examining large foundation models for EDA covering circuit representation learning, generation, optimization, and verification across analog and digital domains.

title: AMSnet: A Netlist Dataset for AMS Circuits
abstract: Dataset delineating schematic-netlist relationships for analog and mixed-signal circuits. Addresses the bottleneck of employing multimodal LLMs for automatic AMS circuit generation by providing comprehensive training data.
method_summary: Large-scale dataset mapping circuit schematic images to SPICE netlists, enabling multimodal LLM training for automated AMS circuit understanding and generation.

title: A Hybrid Vision-Language Framework for Parsing 2D Engineering Drawings into Structured Manufacturing Knowledge
abstract: Hybrid vision-language framework parsing 2D engineering drawings into structured manufacturing knowledge representations. Combines visual understanding with language-based reasoning for comprehensive drawing interpretation.
method_summary: Vision-language hybrid approach extracting structured manufacturing knowledge from engineering drawings through joint visual parsing and semantic reasoning.

title: Toward AI-driven Multimodal Interfaces for Industrial CAD Modeling
abstract: Examines AI-driven multimodal interfaces for industrial 3D CAD modeling, addressing workflow efficiency and user experience challenges in integrating AI technologies with existing CAD systems.
method_summary: Analysis of multimodal AI interface integration with industrial CAD systems, covering speech, gesture, and visual input modalities for improved modeling workflows.

title: Offset-Guided Attention Network for Room-Level Aware Floor Plan Segmentation
abstract: Offset-guided attention mechanism for room-level aware floor plan segmentation. Improves room boundary detection by incorporating spatial offset information into the attention computation.
method_summary: Attention network with offset guidance for room-level segmentation, improving boundary precision through spatial offset-aware feature aggregation.

title: Deep Floor Plan Recognition Using a Multi-Task Network with Room-Boundary-Guided Attention
abstract: Multi-task network recognizing diverse floor plan elements including walls, rooms, doors, windows, and different room types. Room-boundary-guided attention mechanism improves recognition of fine-grained elements.
method_summary: Multi-task CNN with room-boundary-guided attention for simultaneous recognition of walls, rooms, doors, windows, and room types in floor plan images.

title: Automatic Reconstruction of Semantic 3D Models from 2D Floor Plans
abstract: Automatic reconstruction of semantic 3D BIM models from 2D floor plans. Addresses digitalization of existing buildings by extracting building layout information and generating 3D representations.
method_summary: Pipeline converting 2D floor plan images into semantic 3D BIM models through element detection, spatial reasoning, and parametric 3D reconstruction.

title: Component Centric Placement Using Deep Reinforcement Learning for PCB Design
abstract: Deep reinforcement learning approach for automating PCB component placement. Component-centric layout strategy fixing main components at center while placing passive components in proximity using RL optimization.
method_summary: RL-based PCB component placement with component-centric layout strategy, optimizing spatial arrangement through learned placement policies.

title: Large Language Model Agent for Structural Drawing Generation Using ReAct Prompt Engineering and RAG
abstract: Generative AI-based approach for structural drawing generation using LLM agents with ReAct prompt engineering and Retrieval Augmented Generation. Addresses the labor-intensive task of generating structural engineering drawings.
method_summary: LLM agent with ReAct prompting and RAG for automated structural drawing generation, reducing manual effort in structural engineering documentation.

title: Solving Idealized Beam Models from Hand-Drawn Drawings
abstract: Program capable of solving idealized beam models from hand-drawn drawings. Interprets structural engineering sketches to extract beam configurations and compute structural analysis results.
method_summary: Computer vision pipeline interpreting hand-drawn structural beam diagrams, extracting geometric and loading configurations for automated structural analysis.
